title: 系统资源监控
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype, scripted 1920x1080 legacy characterization, every control and metric, canonical monitoring preference, authenticated bounded diagnostics transport, active-only polling lifecycle, error and empty states, responsive geometry, accessibility and zero Reader hot-path work have automated evidence.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: React state and a controlled select; the interval preference is persisted through the canonical NeoView settings service
Authenticated Reader diagnostics HTTP using a versioned bounded DTO; no Node or platform API enters the browser chunk
Canonical [nodes.neoview.performance.monitor] settings with one-time legacy import compatibility

unsupportedNodes.source: onMount calls startMonitoring while isMonitoring is already true, causing an early return and no initial sample
unsupportedNodes.replacement: Separate enabled preference from active timer/request ownership; activation always performs one immediate sample

sourceUiInventory.title: Card 外壳、监控开关和刷新
acceptanceItems: systemMonitor ID、系统资源监控标题、Monitor 图标、insights Panel
开始/停止监控按钮使用 Activity 图标并切换 default/destructive 语义
刷新按钮使用 RefreshCw 图标，旧版无 stats 时禁用
Card 继续使用共享折叠、隐藏、排序、独立窗口与高度行为

sourceUiInventory.title: 刷新间隔与加载错误状态
acceptanceItems: 刷新间隔标签
0.5/1/2/5 秒四个选项且默认 1 秒
运行中改间隔会替换 timer 而非叠加
错误使用 destructive 提示且后续成功清除
无样本时区分加载中与已停止提示

sourceUiInventory.title: 系统总览与 CPU
acceptanceItems: 运行时间按天/小时/分钟降级
负载平均显示 1/5/15 分钟且保留两位
CPU 核心数量
CPU 平均值取全部核心算术平均
两列 Core 0..N 列表
进度条 low/medium/high/critical 阈值为 50/75/90 且 critical 使用 destructive

sourceUiInventory.title: 内存、网络和磁盘
acceptanceItems: 内存使用百分比及总计/已用/空闲/缓存
网络下载和上传速率独立显示
磁盘使用百分比和进度条
磁盘总计/已用/可用
字节使用 1024 进制 B/KB/MB/GB/TB，速率使用 B/s..GB/s

sourceUiInventory.title: GPU 明确占位
acceptanceItems: GPU 标题和 Cpu 图标语义
明确显示 GPU 监控功能开发中和需要后端支持
不得把系统/进程 CPU 伪装成 GPU 利用率

sourceUiInventory.title: 配置、传输和采样生命周期
acceptanceItems: 监控开关和间隔不再运行期写 localStorage
后端响应使用版本化 schema 和有限数值
折叠、隐藏、停用和卸载立即取消请求及 timer
同一时刻最多一个请求，慢请求不重叠
停止后仍保留最后样本供手动刷新
Card 未激活时不采样且不影响 Reader 翻页

sourceUiInventory.title: 有界趋势、峰值与重置
acceptanceItems: 趋势只保留固定上限样本且不落 Reader 业务表
显示 CPU 与内存窗口峰值而不伪造旧版控件
暂停保留当前历史，重置显式清空
Card 停用后不后台追加样本

sourceUiInventory.title: 可访问性与响应式几何
acceptanceItems: 按钮、select 与错误状态具有可访问名称/role
进度条具备有限 0..100 的数值语义
桌面保持三列总览、CPU 两列与磁盘三列
420x360 Card 视口不横向溢出且密度可读
减少动态效果时禁用进度条 transition

sourceUiInventory.title: 自动化、视觉和性能证据
acceptanceItems: 旧版固定样本 1920x1080 characterization 可重复
React 单测覆盖 timer、请求互斥、取消、错误恢复和格式边界
真实 desktop/420x360 Chromium 覆盖启停、间隔和 active-only 请求
性能门禁证明隐藏 Card 零轮询且不新增 Reader page-turn 请求

items.title: 复刻共享 Card 外壳和注册语义
items.targetContract: Keep the systemMonitor identity, title, icon, insights placement and shared Card chrome without importing the scaffold at runtime.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 开始和停止监控
items.targetContract: A single control starts one immediate sample and one timer, then stops and cancels both without losing the last sample.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 手动刷新
items.targetContract: Manual refresh requests one sample without creating a second timer or overlapping an in-flight request.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 刷新间隔选择
items.targetContract: The controlled 500/1000/2000/5000 ms selector replaces the active timer atomically and persists through canonical settings.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 加载、停止和错误状态
items.targetContract: Loading, stopped-without-data, stale-data and recoverable error states remain distinct and never unmount the Card shell.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 系统运行时间、负载和核心总览
items.targetContract: Render bounded uptime, 1/5/15 minute load averages and CPU core count with stable formatting.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 逐核心 CPU 与平均值
items.targetContract: Render a bounded per-core CPU list, average and threshold styling from sanitized percentages.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 内存占用
items.targetContract: Render total, used, free and cached bytes plus a clamped percentage without division-by-zero artifacts.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 网络接收与发送速率
items.targetContract: Render receive and transmit rates with honest unavailable states when the platform sampler cannot supply them.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 磁盘容量
items.targetContract: Render aggregate total, used and free space with a clamped percentage and no filesystem work in the browser.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: GPU 能力状态
items.targetContract: Preserve the explicit unsupported state until a canonical host GPU sampler exists; do not fabricate utilization.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 百分比、时间和字节格式
items.targetContract: Preserve source-evidenced rounding and 1024-based units while sanitizing NaN, infinity and negative values.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 监控偏好规范持久化
items.targetContract: Write only the canonical NeoView TOML namespace and import the two legacy localStorage keys at most once.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 鉴权诊断 DTO
items.targetContract: Use a versioned authenticated bounded diagnostics contract shared with CLI diagnostics instead of Tauri IPC or browser platform calls.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: active-only 单请求轮询
items.targetContract: Poll only while the Card is visible, expanded and enabled; cancellation and singleflight prevent late or overlapping samples.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 可访问状态
items.targetContract: Expose named controls, alert/status semantics and finite progress values without color-only meaning.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 桌面和受限 Card 几何
items.targetContract: Preserve information density at desktop width and reflow safely in the 420x360 Card viewport.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 旧版与 XR 视觉证据
items.targetContract: Compare the scripted fixed-sample legacy Card and XR Card at 1920x1080 plus the constrained XR viewport.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 零翻页热路径开销
items.targetContract: Inactive Card work is exactly zero, samples never overlap, history is bounded and no Reader navigation state is written.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.

items.title: 有界趋势、峰值、暂停和重置
items.targetContract: Maintain a fixed-size in-memory sample window for CPU and memory trends and peaks, preserve it while paused, clear it explicitly and perform no sampling while inactive.
items.notes: Explicit XR functional-scope completion: the legacy Card only rendered the latest sample; this bounded history must not be misreported as source UI parity.

items.title: 有意修复和差异记录
items.targetContract: Document the legacy default-on early-return bug, total-network-versus-rate mismatch, unavailable GPU data and any platform metric gaps.
items.notes: Frozen before production React implementation; promote only with dimension-specific tracked evidence.
